description: Simple ankle sprain, ambulatory, can bear weight; no red flags.

patient.name: Alex P., 22M
patient.chief_complaint: Twisted right ankle playing basketball 2 hours ago. Mild swelling and tenderness over lateral malleolus. Able to bear weight with mild pain. No numbness, no deformity, no other injuries.

rubric_notes: Normal vitals. Single resource (ankle X-ray per Ottawa rules). Per RUBRIC Rule 4: ESI 4 (one resource - X-ray). Could be ESI 3 if multiple resources end up needed (X-ray + splint + crutches), but at triage it's typically counted as one decision point = ESI 4. fast_track appropriate.
